---
title: ""
---

## Wolves and ungulates

- My current project at [LECA](https://leca.osug.fr/). How do wild mammals respond when extirpated predators are coming back? Well, maybe not that much. At least, not in most current European ecosystems, that are so shaped by humans. Focusing on two emblematic species: the chamois (one of our Alpine moutain "goats") and the gray wolf. Check below to know more.

<!-- -->

- I'm also quite interested about methodological questions about these kind of topics: habitat selection, activity pattern analysis, etc. May write a bit about this one of these days.

## Publications

## My thoughts on the topic

## People I work with
